title: Subsets
description: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets (the power set). The solution set must not contain duplicate subsets. Return the solution in any order.

examples.explanation: The subsets of the array [1,2,3] include each individual element, combinations of two elements, and the empty set, leading to a total of 8 subsets.
For the single element array [0], the only subsets are the empty set and the set containing the element itself.
The subsets of [1,2] include the empty set, both individual elements, and the combination of both elements, resulting in 4 subsets.

constraints: The length of nums is between 0 and 10.
hints: Consider using a backtracking approach to explore each subset possibility.
Iterate through the array and decide for each element whether to include it in the current subset.
Make sure to handle the empty subset as a valid output.
Think about how you would generate subsets recursively.
